raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 21,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tee gann dsird manni
waidam/ bet Eepreeztuataja
man newaid/ wiſti manni Ee-
naidneeki dsird mannu Nelaimi-
bu/ un preezajahs/ ka Tu ta eſti
darrijs/ kad Tu to Deenu at-
weddiſt/ ko tu eſti iſfauzis/ tad
tee buhs itt ka es.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 22,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Laid wiſſa winnu Bleh-
diba tawa Preekſcha nahk/ un
darri teem/ ka tu man eſti dar-
rijs wiſſu mannu Pahrkahp-
schanu deht/ jo mannas Waide-
schanas irr dauds/ un manna
Sirds irr nogurrust.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ta II. Nodalla.
Jeremijus noschehlo ſawo Kauschu Behbas:
1.etc. Atminn tob ſawo Grehku/ ar ko
tee tahdas Behdas irr padarriſchi: 13.
Skubbina tohs arri uhs Atgreeshann no
Grehkeem: 19. Nakſia winneem arridſan
preekſcha/ ka teem buhs Deewu peefaukt:
20.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "A irr tas KUNGS to
Zianas Meitu ar ſawu
Dufnibu itt ka (ar
Padebbeſim) apklahjie? Wiꞥſch
irr to Israëta Goddibu no Deb-
bes us to Semmi nomettis/
Wiꞥſch ſawo Rahju Paneſli ne
irr atminnejs ſawas Dufmibas
Deena.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 2,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tas KUNGS irr wiſſus
Ichkaba Dſihwottus aprihjis/
mettis.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 3,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Wiꞥſch irr eekſch ſam
bahrgas Dufmibas wiſſu Ra-
gu Israëta falauſijs/ Wiꞥſch
fawu labbu Rohku atwilis/
tee Eenaidneeki nahze/ Wi-
irr prett Jehkabu apſkaitees
Ugguns Leeſma/ kas wiſſo
kahrt aprihj.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 4,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Wiꞥſch irr ſawu Sto-
uswilis ka Eenaidneeks/ un
wu labbu Rohku pazehlis
Prettineeks/ un nokawis wiſ-
kas Azzim patihk/ Wiꞥſch irr
wu Bahrsibu eekſch tahs Zian-
Meitas Dſihwotta iſgahsis
Ugguni.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 5,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tas KUNGS irr tappis
Eenaidneeks/ Wiꞥſch irr Ji-
elu aprihjis/ wiſſus winna ſt-
ſtus Nammus irr Wiꞥſch a-
rihjis/ winna Stiprumus
Wiꞥſch maitajs/ un irr pee ta-
Meitas Juhda Noschebloſch-
uu un Watdefchanu wairojs
"
    },
    {
      "n": 6,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Wiꞥſch irr ſawu Dſih-
ſti noplehſis/ kas ta bija/
Dahrs/ un ſawu Sa-eeſchan-
Weetu maitajs/ tas KUNG-
tus un Svehdeenas aismir-
un eekſch ſawas bahrgas Du-
bas to Rehnittu un Preestert
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
